title: T-072 — shouldFail=true click-driven error-transition test in patterns.test.tsx (FT-012)
prompt:
# T-072 — shouldFail=true click-driven error-transition test in patterns.test.tsx (FT-012)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5.y
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-012** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P3** (XS effort)

## Goal
Extend patterns.test.tsx with a click-driven shouldFail=true scenario asserting the error transition.

## Implementation contract
1. Add a new `it('transitions to error state when shouldFail=true', ...)` block.
2. Use userEvent.click on the submit button.
3. Assert the error banner is visible and submit button re-enables for retry.

## Files (scope)
- packages/ui/src/__tests__/patterns.test.tsx [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the pattern fixture has shouldFail=true, when userEvent.click submits, then the error banner is visible.
2. Given the error banner is visible, when the user clicks submit again, then a retry attempt is dispatched.

## Test strategy
- RED: add the new it() block asserting error transition first; it must fail.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/ui test patterns`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not change the pattern implementation — test-only.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Add a `shouldFail=true` click-driven test in patterns.test.tsx that exercises the MODAL-SCHEMA error state transition.
pipeline_inputs.details: Current patterns.test.tsx only covers the happy path. Add one test that clicks a submit button with `shouldFail=true` in the test fixture and asserts the error state renders correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Given the pattern fixture has shouldFail=true, when userEvent.click submits, then the error banner is visible.
Given the error banner is visible, when the user clicks submit again, then a retry attempt is dispatched.
test_strategy: RED: add the new it() block asserting error transition first; it must fail.
risk_red_lines: Do not change the pattern implementation — test-only.
Do not skip the pre-existing tests when refactoring — RED → GREEN must show zero regression on the prior suite
